records.ety: [Up + shot, equivalent to scot share, reckoning. Cf. the phrase to cast up an account.]

defs: Final issue; conclusion; the sum and substance; the end; the result; the consummation.
quotes: I can not pursue with any safety this sport to the upshot.
We account it frailty that threescore years and ten make the upshot of man's pleasurable existence.
